name: Angel Flight
original_name: エンジェルフライト 国際霊柩送還士
overview: Ryoko Yonekura stars in this series written by Ryota Kosawa about specialists who transport the deceased back home. The company Angel Hearse is run by Nami Izawa and Kashiwagi. A drama that portrays love between the deceased and the bereaved.

trailers.title: Angel Flight | Official Trailer | Amazon Prime (English Subtitles)
